description: Infrastructure write routes allowed outside Manifest domain command surface.

rules.comment: Infrastructure: Webhook retry processing and DLQ management
Composite routes wrap multiple Manifest commands in atomic transactions
Recipe-scoped composite routes (update-with-version, restore-version)
Recipe cost calculation route using RecipeVersion.updateCosts command
Recipe scaling routes using RecipeIngredient.updateWasteFactor command
Allergen update route using Dish.update command
Allergen conflict detection using AllergenWarning.create command
Prep list save route using PrepList/PrepListItem manifest commands
AI-generated prep task bulk creation using PrepTask.create command
AI Bulk Task Generation: propose tasks via GPT-4o-mini (no persistence)
AI Bulk Task Generation: persist accepted tasks as PrepTask records via Prisma
Legacy infrastructure routes using Manifest runtime (to be migrated)
Conflict detection infrastructure
User preferences — settings, not domain command (permanently exempted in audit registry)
Validated shift creation with overlap/overtime/certification checks using ScheduleShift.create command
Validated shift update with overlap/overtime/certification checks using ScheduleShift.update command

Infrastructure: Equipment alert management using direct DB access

Infrastructure: Equipment status/condition update using direct Prisma
